---
title: "About"
---

# About This Website

This website was created as part of my **AAI1001 Data Engineering and Visualization** Week 02 lab.

The purpose of this website is to practise creating and publishing a simple personal website using:

- Quarto
- RStudio
- Git
- GitHub
- GitHub Pages

## What I Learned

Through this lab, I learned how a Quarto website is structured using files such as:

- `_quarto.yml` for website settings
- `index.qmd` for the homepage
- `about.qmd` for an additional page
- `styles.css` for basic styling
- `docs/` for the rendered website output

## What Was Challenging

The most confusing part was understanding the link between my local RStudio project, the GitHub repository, and the live website.

At first, I also found it confusing that editing a `.qmd` file alone was not enough. I had to render the website again so that the updated HTML files were created inside the `docs/` folder.

## Reflection

This lab helped me understand how websites can be built from simple markdown-style files and published online. It also gave me practice using GitHub Pages to host a website publicly.

> Overall, this was a useful introduction to combining content, code, styling, and version control in one workflow.
